allow: Bash(curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/ps 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=d['models'][0]; print\(f'context_length: {m[\\"context_length\\"]}, size: {m[\\"size\\"]/1e9:.1f}GB'\)")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/generate -d '{"model":"qwen3:30b","keep_alive":0}' && sleep 5 && curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/ps 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('models loaded:', len\(d['models']\)\)")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/ps 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=d['models'][0]; print\(f'context_length: {m[\\"context_length\\"]}, size: {m[\\"size\\"]/1e9:.1f}GB, vram: {m[\\"size_vram\\"]/1e9:.1f}GB'\)")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:11434/v1/chat/completions -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"model":"qwen3:30b","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"say hi in one word"}],"max_tokens":10}' --max-time 120 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['choices'][0]['message']\)")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/tags 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for m in d['models']:
    print\(f'{m[\\"name\\"]:30s} {m[\\"size\\"]/1e9:.1f} GB'\)
")
